headline: Mideast Aluminum Makers Suffer Damage From Iranian Attacks
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Two Middle Eastern aluminum producers were hit by Iranian attacks on Saturday, highlighting the challenge to the global economy as the war disrupts vital industries. The region’s top producer, Emirates Global Aluminium, said it sustained “significant damage” at its site in Abu Dhabi, while Aluminium Bahrain said it was assessing the extent of damage to its facility. The attacks are another blow to the region’s commodity industry, with producers mostly prevented from exporting by t
